location.name: Art appraisers in Cincinnati, Ohio

listedAppraisers.name: Prestige Estate Services
listedAppraisers.description: Prestige Estate Services provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Fine art (19th–21st century), Antiques, Furniture, Insurance claims, Divorce settlements, Charitable donations. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Malton Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Malton Gallery is one of Cincinnati's longest-running fine art galleries with over 52 years in business. Located on Edwards Rd in the Hyde Park area, they offer a rotating collection of fine art, custom framing services, and art consultation. Described by customers as having a huge collection of art with different exhibitions regularly. Verified via Yellow Pages listing with 3 reviews.

listedAppraisers.name: Miller Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Miller Gallery has maintained a reputation as one of the finest galleries in the US for over 50 years. Located on Erie Ave in Cincinnati's Hyde Park neighborhood, they are proud of their experienced and exceptional staff who provide art appraisal, consultation, and gallery services. Verified via Yellow Pages listing.

listedAppraisers.name: Jack Wood Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Jack Wood Gallery is a well-established Cincinnati art gallery with over 33 years in business. Located on Madison Rd in the Oakley/Hyde Park area, they offer art gallery services, dealer consultations, and appraisal services. Verified via Yellow Pages listing.
